zh.lifeSummary: 當Heiress of Holkettle Margaret Bethune - heiress of holkettle於1328年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾時，她的父親Alexander de Bethune48歲，母親Isabel d'Estouteville41歲。她和Sir Robert Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeath至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1417年在英國蘇格蘭金加迪爾斯同哈文享年89歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Heiress of Holkettle Margaret Bethune - heiress of holkettle于1328年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾时，她的父亲Alexander de Bethune48岁，母亲Isabel d'Estouteville41岁。她和Sir Robert Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeath至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1417年在英国苏格兰金加迪爾斯同哈文享年89岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾。

nameMeanings.name: Bethune
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin); French (Béthune): habitational name from Béthune in Pas-de-Calais, Picardy, France, recorded in the 8th century in the Latin form Bitunia, probably an adjective (with villa understood) derived from the oblique form of an ancient Germanic personal name Betto, an assimilated form of Berto (see Bert ). See also Scottish Beaton .

variants.name: Beaton
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Béthune in Pas-de-Calais, France (see Bethune ). The Hebridean family of McBeth , hereditary physicians, adopted the surname Beaton in the 16th century.
English: from the Middle English personal name Beton, a diminutive of Bete, a pet form of Beatrice (see Beatrice ). Compare Beat .

variants.name: Bert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Philibert, Pierre.
German, French, and Polish: from a short form of various compound personal names formed with ancient Germanic berht ‘bright, famous’ (see for example Bertram ).
English: from the Middle English female personal name Berte (Old French Berte, from ancient Germanic Berta ).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Heiress of Holkettle Margaret Bethune - heiress of holkettle was born in 1328, in Argyll, Scotland, her father, Alexander de Bethune, was 48 and her mother, Isabel d'Estouteville, was 41. She had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Sir Robert Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeath. She died in 1417, in Stonehaven, Kincardineshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 89, and was buried in Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Heiress of Holkettle Margaret Bethune - heiress of holkettle est née en 1328, à Argyll, Écosse, son père, Alexander de Bethune, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Isabel d'Estouteville, avait 41 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Sir Robert Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeath. Elle est décédée en 1417, à Stonehaven, Kincardineshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 89 ans, et a été enterrée à Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Heiress of Holkettle Margaret Bethune - heiress of holkettle 1328 in Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alexander de Bethune 48 und ihre Mutter Isabel d'Estouteville 41. Sie hatte mit Sir Robert Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeath mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1417 im Alter von 89 Jahren in Stonehaven, Kincardineshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Heiress of Holkettle Margaret Bethune - heiress of holkettle è nata il nel 1328 nel Argyll, Scotland, sua padre, Alexander de Bethune, aveva 48 anni e sua madre, Isabel d'Estouteville, aveva 41 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Sir Robert Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeath. Morì nel 1417, nel Stonehaven, Kincardineshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 89 anni, e fu sepolta a Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Heiress of Holkettle Margaret Bethune - heiress of holkettleが1328年にスコットランドアルグイルで生まれた時，父Alexander de Bethuneは48歳，母Isabel d'Estoutevilleは41歳であった。彼女はSir Robert Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeathとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1417年にイギリススコットランドキンカーディンエシュアイアストーネヘイベンで89歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Heiress of Holkettle Margaret Bethune - heiress of holkettle(이)가 1328년 스컷랜드 아그이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alexander de Bethune(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel d'Estouteville(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 Sir Robert Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeath(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1417년 영국 스코틀랜드 킨카딘실르 스톤하븐에서 89세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Heiress of Holkettle Margaret Bethune - heiress of holkettle nasceu em 1328, em Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, Alexander de Bethune, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Isabel d'Estouteville, tinha 41 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Sir Robert Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeath. Ela faleceu em 1417, em Stonehaven, Kincardineshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 89 anos, e foi sepultada em Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Heiress of Holkettle Margaret Bethune - heiress of holkettle родилась в 1328 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Alexander de Bethune было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel d'Estouteville, 41. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Sir Robert Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeath. Она умерла в 1417 г. в местности стоунэавен, кинкардаинешир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 89 лет и была похоронена в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Heiress of Holkettle Margaret Bethune - heiress of holkettle nació en 1328, en Argyll, Scotland, su papá, Alexander de Bethune, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Isabel d'Estouteville, tenía 41 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Sir Robert Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeath. Murió en 1417, en Stonehaven, Kincardineshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 89 años, y fue sepultada en Aberdeenshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
